返回本批次

显示 HN：M3 Pro 上与 Gemma E2B 的实时 AI（音频/视频输入、语音输出）

Show HN: Real-time AI (audio/video in, voice out) on an M3 Pro with Gemma E2B

github.com 作者 karimf 分数 67 评论 3 2026/04/06 01:53
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 设备上的实时多模式人工智能。与完全在您的机器上运行的人工智能进行自然的语音和视觉对话。 Parlor 使用 Gemma 4 E2B 来理解语音和视觉，并使用 Kokoro 来理解文本到语音。你说话，出示你的相机，它就会回复你，所有这一切都在本地进行。
  2. parlor_realtime_ai_with_audio_video_input_optimized.mp4
  3. 研究预览。这是一个早期的实验。预计会有粗糙的边缘和错误。
  4. 为什么？我在我的家庭服务器上自行托管了一个完全免费的语音人工智能，以帮助人们学习说英语。它有数百个每月活跃用户，我一直在考虑如何保持它的免费性，同时使其可持续发展。显而易见的答案是：在设备上运行所有内容，消除任何服务器成本。六个月前，我需要 RTX 5090 来实时运行语音模型。谷歌刚刚发布了一个超级强大的小型模型，我可以在我的 M3 Pro 上实时运行它，并且还具有视觉功能！当然，你不能用它来进行代理编码，但它对于学习新语言的人来说是一个游戏规则改变者。想象一下，几年后，人们可以在手机上本地运行它。他们可以将相机对准物体并谈论它们。而且这个模型是多语言的，因此人们可以根据需要随时回退到他们的母语。这基本上就是 OpenAI 几年前演示的内容。工作原理 浏览器（麦克风 + 摄像头） │ │ WebSocket（音频 PCM + JPEG 帧） ▼ FastAPI 服务器 ├── Gemma 4 E2B 通过 LiteRT-LM (GPU) → 理解语音 + 视觉 └── Kokoro TTS（Mac 上的 MLX，Linux 上的 ONNX）→ 回复 │ │ WebSocket（流式音频块） ▼ 浏览器（播放 + 转录）
  5. 浏览器中的语音活动检测 (Silero VAD)。免提，无需按键通话。打断。通过说话打断人工智能的话语。句子级 TTS 流。在生成完整响应之前开始播放音频。

Original Summary

  1. On-device, real-time multimodal AI. Have natural voice and vision conversations with an AI that runs entirely on your machine. Parlor uses Gemma 4 E2B for understanding speech and vision, and Kokoro for text-to-speech. You talk, show your camera, and it talks back, all locally.
  2. parlor_realtime_ai_with_audio_video_input_optimized.mp4
  3. Research preview. This is an early experiment. Expect rough edges and bugs.
  4. Why? I'm self-hosting a totally free voice AI on my home server to help people learn speaking English. It has hundreds of monthly active users, and I've been thinking about how to keep it free while making it sustainable. The obvious answer: run everything on-device, eliminating any server cost. Six months ago I needed an RTX 5090 to run just the voice models in real-time. Google just released a super capable small model that I can run on my M3 Pro in real-time, with vision too! Sure you can't do agentic coding with this, but it is a game-changer for people learning a new language. Imagine a few years from now that people can run this locally on their phones. They can point their camera at objects and talk about them. And this model is multi-lingual, so people can always fallback to their native language if they want. This is essentially what OpenAI demoed a few years ago. How it works Browser (mic + camera) │ │ WebSocket (audio PCM + JPEG frames) ▼ FastAPI server ├── Gemma 4 E2B via LiteRT-LM (GPU) → understands speech + vision └── Kokoro TTS (MLX on Mac, ONNX on Linux) → speaks back │ │ WebSocket (streamed audio chunks) ▼ Browser (playback + transcript)
  5. Voice Activity Detection in the browser (Silero VAD). Hands-free, no push-to-talk. Barge-in. Interrupt the AI mid-sentence by speaking. Sentence-level TTS streaming. Audio starts playing before the full response is generated.

评论（默认中文）

dvt 2026/04/06 13:41
扎实的工作和出色的展示，我用 Kokoro 做了很多东西，延迟令人难以置信。太疯狂了，Apple 的失误太严重了……感觉你的演示应该是 Siri 演示（我的意思是，以尽可能最赞美的方式）。
Solid work and great showcase, I've done a bunch of stuff with Kokoro and the latency is incredible. So crazy how badly Apple dropped the ball... feels like your demo should be a Siri demo (I mean that in the most complimentary way possible).
